summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema SAMIDEL visual field grouping in Custom Listings. Both backend API and frontend UI are fully functional with proper visual differentiation between 'Ordem de Fabrico' and 'Checkpoints por Etapa' sections.
passed_tests: API /api/custom-views/fields returns grouped_fields structure with 'of' and 'checkpoints'
OF section displays 16 fields with blue background and FileText icon
Checkpoints section displays 2 stages with green background and CheckSquare icon
Stage-based organization: 'Planear Materiais' (2 checkpoints) and 'Confeção' (1 checkpoint)
Visual differentiation: blue background (rgb(239, 246, 255)) for OF, green background (rgb(236, 253, 245)) for checkpoints
Field addition from both sections works correctly
Selected columns show emerald background indicators for checkpoint fields
Custom view creation with mixed OF and checkpoint fields successful
View data display shows proper column headers and data
Success messages displayed correctly after view creation

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All grouped fields APIs working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - Visual grouping fully implemented, minor UI interaction improvements possible
